hooks.command: input=$(cat); if echo "$input" | grep -qi 'vagrantfile'; then echo '--- [hook] vagrant validate ---'; vagrant validate && echo '[OK] Vagrantfile valid' || echo '[FAIL] Vagrantfile invalid'; elif echo "$input" | grep -q 'ansible' && echo "$input" | grep -q '\.yml'; then echo '--- [hook] ansible-lint ---'; command -v ansible-lint >/dev/null 2>&1 && ansible-lint . 2>&1 | head -30 || echo '[SKIP] ansible-lint not installed'; fi
